item_purpose: AI-based perception pipeline for object detection, safety analysis, deployment benchmarking, and cybersecurity evaluation in an ADAS context.

operational_context.environment: Offline development and deployment-oriented benchmarking environment
operational_context.primary_use_case: Object detection under urban driving scenarios using nuScenes-based training and evaluation

rationale: Perception inputs can be manipulated or spoofed
Model artifacts can be tampered with before deployment
Inference runtime can be disrupted, affecting availability
Training data integrity directly affects system behavior
